issue_title: Build tag is not correctly added to WHEEL metadata file
issue_text:
**Describe the bug**  
The build tag (`distlib.wheel.Wheel.buildver`) is not added to the `WHEEL` metadata file as prescribed by [PEP 491](https://peps.python.org/pep-0491/#file-contents).

**To Reproduce**
Use `distlib.wheel` to generate a wheel package with `buildver='1foo'`. Observe that the `WHEEL` metadata file does not contain a `Build: 1foo` line. Alternatively, <kbd>Ctrl+F</kbd> for `buildver` in [distlib/wheel.py](https://github.com/pypa/distlib/blob/c6fc08e9fbc81c4350ecc5c7e9729c5b
success_criteria: 补充真实仓库后，需要人工完善成功标准。
